reference.name: LAF Enterprise ERP Gold (hardened)
hardening: generic edit + soft-delete UI for all catalog modules

reproduction.name: LAF Enterprise ERP GoldGenerated-Hardened
reproduction.howBuilt: Pure deterministic `--mode erp-gold` (no local-LLM proposal). Reproduces the entire hardened template surface.

reproductionMetrics.explanation: The 20-test .NET gap (222 - 202) is exactly the 5 non-deterministic local-LLM catalog modules x 4 tests each (create / requires-name / edit / deactivate). Every hand-coded hardening change lives in the generator templates/spec, so the deterministic surface — EF migrations, auth hardening, edit/delete UI, anti-forgery, audited security events, the 13 end-to-end scenarios, all 23 spec modules, and 100% of the Playwright suite — reproduces identically. Module count 23/28 = 82% reflects the intentionally non-deterministic LLM extras, not a hardening gap.
